title: Yandex Networking
description: T-shirt customization at a corporate event for guests and attendees. Moscow, OKO Tower. Live t-shirt painting as a networking and team-building activity.

details.task: Organize a custom activation at the Yandex corporate networking event at OKO Tower.
details.solution: Set up a t-shirt customization zone with artists. Each attendee received a t-shirt with an individual design — serving as both a networking element and a memorable souvenir.
details.result: Over 150 custom t-shirts in a single day. The activation became the centerpiece of the event and received high praise from organizers.
